(CASE WHEN ((coalesce(LOWER("JOB CODE"), '')).(CONTAINS(LOWER('intern')))) THEN 'Intern/Regular Flag' ELSE '' END)

(CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(MIDDLE), '')), LOWER('NMN'))) THEN 'Middle Initial NMN' ELSE '                  ' END)
